title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.600 - Officer having attachment may invoke aid, when
text:
532.600.  Officer having attachment may invoke aid, when. — In the execution of such writs of attachment and precept, or either of them, the sheriff or other person to whom they shall be directed may call to his aid the power of the county, as is provided by law in the execution of writs and process by any officer.
(RSMo 1939 § 1612) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1448; 1919 § 1898; 1909 § 2463
